title: Nimbus: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Nimbus keeps plans, tasks and updates in one calm place, so your team always knows what is next.
Stop stitching five tools together. Nimbus covers the whole flow from idea to done.
cards: Turn fuzzy ideas into measurable outcomes everyone can see.
A keyboard-first interface that never gets in your way.
Comments, mentions and shared context, right where work happens.
Know status at a glance without chasing anyone for updates.
Your data stays yours, with granular roles and audit logs.
Let routine steps run themselves and focus on the work that matters.

sections.text: Break big goals into clear steps, set owners and dates, and watch the plan stay in sync as reality changes.
No more guessing who is doing what. Every task, decision and file lives in one shared, searchable space.

sections.sub: No long setup, no consultant required.
steps: Sign up and invite your team in under a minute.
Import tasks or start fresh with a ready template.
Watch updates roll in and ship your first project.

sections.quote: We replaced three tools with Nimbus and cut our weekly status meeting in half. The team finally trusts the plan.
sections.author: Sample Person

sections.sub: Start free. Upgrade when your team grows.

items: Is there really a free plan?
Yes. The Starter plan is free forever for up to five members, no card required.
Can I import from other tools?
You can bring tasks in from a spreadsheet or start from a ready template in seconds.
You pay per active member, monthly or yearly. Cancel anytime, no lock-in.
Data is encrypted in transit and at rest, with roles and audit logs on paid plans.
Team and Business plans include guided onboarding and priority support.

sections.sub: Join thousands of teams who replaced the chaos with one clear plan.

sections.tagline: One calm place for plans, tasks and updates. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Nimbus is a sample template with dummy content
